commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Is the LORD'S hand shortened. you shall see now whether my word shall come to pass unto you or not. Unable: Hebrew, "shortened. "Septuagint, "insufficient. "Moses had expressed his astonishment, not his doubts; though the words might convey the latter idea to us more than his behaviour in chap. But God sees the heart. Hebrew may be also, "hath called thee "(Calmet) Septuagint, "shall come upon thee "and execute the thing, as soon as thou shalt promise it.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
